body:
## Summary
- Updates q050 English wording from the literal "source-critical" phrasing to natural "source criticism" wording.
- Regenerates the CSV/static question bank outputs for q050 and its derived variants.
- Adds validator and regression coverage so q050/q376/q379 single-choice source-criticism English cannot regress to "source-critical" wording.

## Validation
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "source-criticism|q050 source criticism" scripts/derived-content.test.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

## Note
- `npm run test:derived-content` still reports existing generated true/false assertion failures unrelated to q050; the new q050 source-criticism test in that file passes.
title: [codex] Naturalize q050 source criticism English
